name: pescheckit/pescheck-clients
description: API for Pescheck  ## Authentication This API supports three authentication methods: 1. **OAuth2** (recommended for API clients) - Use client credentials flow 2. **JWT Bearer** (for user-based access) - Obtain tokens via /api/jwt/ endpoint 3. **Cookie** (for browser-based access) - Session authentication via web login  ## Quick Start for API Clients 1. Select your environment from the servers dropdown 2. Use OAuth2 with client credentials flow 3. Scopes are automatically included: read:api, create:api, update:api
